1: If it had it had not been been the LORD LORD who was on our side, now may Israel say;
2: If it had it had not been been the LORD LORD who was on our side, when men rose up against us:
3: When their wrath was kindled against us:
4: The stream had gone over our soul:
6: Who hath not given us as as a prey to their teeth.
7: The snare is broken, and we are escaped.
